title: hypolepis capitellum
intro: Hypolepis capitellum, also known as the club fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Adiantaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hypolepis capitellum include relief from fever, digestive issues, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
